changeSet.author: sihsalus
sihsalus
sihsalus
changeSet.comment: Attachment concepts are OCL-owned; remove legacy Liquibase stubs only when they are not referenced or enriched.

changeSet.author: sihsalus
changeSet.sql: update global_property set property_value = 'jpg,jpeg,png,pdf' where property = 'attachments.allowedFileExtensions' and (property_value is null or trim(property_value) = '');

rollback.sql: update global_property set property_value = '' where property = 'attachments.allowedFileExtensions' and property_value = 'jpg,jpeg,png,pdf';
